channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18421] need input on dom stripe size
item.description:
When I execute the following command to create a DoM file with specific striping settings:

lfs setstripe -E 128k -L mdt -E 2M -c 1 -E 4M -c 2 -E -1 -c 4

I notice that the stripe size for components beyond the component 0 defaults to 128k, which I am not sure (on behavior). Usually, if I create striping without specifying the -s option, the stripe size defaults to 1MB.

My question is whether DoM files should also default to a 1MB stripe size for unspecified components. For instance, in the above example, should Component 0 be 128k, and the rest follow the 1MB default?

Below is the output detailing this behavior. Is this a bug or it should be a document change explaining the behavior

 

case 1-----

lfs setstripe -E 128k -L mdt -E 2M -c 1 -E 4M -c 2 -E -1 -c 4 /mnt/lustre/rajeev

[root@test2-single-node rocky]# lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/rajeev

/mnt/lustre/rajeev

  lcm_layout_gen:    4

  lcm_mirror_count:  1

  lcm_entry_count:   4

    lcme_id:             1

    lcme_mirror_id:      0

    lcme_flags:          init

    lcme_extent.e_start: 0

    lcme_extent.e_end:   131072

      lmm_stripe_count:  0

      lmm_stripe_size:   131072

      lmm_pattern:       mdt

      lmm_layout_gen:    0

      lmm_stripe_offset: 0

 

    lcme_id:             2

    lcme_mirror_id:      0

    lcme_flags:          0

    lcme_extent.e_start: 131072

    lcme_extent.e_end:   2097152

      lmm_stripe_count:  1

      lmm_stripe_size:   131072

      lmm_pattern:       raid0

      lmm_layout_gen:    0

      lmm_stripe_offset: -1

 

    lcme_id:             3

    lcme_mirror_id:      0

    lcme_flags:          0

    lcme_extent.e_start: 2097152

    lcme_extent.e_end:   4194304

      lmm_stripe_count:  2

      lmm_stripe_size:   131072 <<<<

      lmm_pattern:       raid0

      lmm_layout_gen:    0

      lmm_stripe_offset: -1

 

    lcme_id:             4

    lcme_mirror_id:      0

    lcme_flags:          0

    lcme_extent.e_start: 4194304

    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF

      lmm_stripe_count:  4

      lmm_stripe_size:   131072 <<<<<

      lmm_pattern:       raid0

      lmm_layout_gen:    0

      lmm_stripe_offset: -1

case 2 —

[root@test2-single-node rocky]# 

[root@test2-single-node rocky]# lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/rajeev1

/mnt/lustre/rajeev1

lmm_stripe_count:  1

lmm_stripe_size:   1048576 <<<<<

lmm_pattern:       raid0

lmm_layout_gen:    0

lmm_stripe_offset: 0

obdidx objid objid group

    0             6           0x6             0
item.summary: need input on dom stripe size

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/57501/
Subject: LU-18421 utils: Do not inherit stripe size from DOM component
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 478dd88f38b77d3cd63c0f931d11b57a03c50928

"Rajeev Mishra <rajeevm@hpe.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/57502
Subject: LU-18421 test: Verify Default Stripe Size Creation
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 1ccb947141b4d98dd072f125133583be15f88e74

"Rajeev Mishra <rajeevm@hpe.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/57501
Subject: LU-18421 utils: Fix Default Stripe Size Creation
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: d02183cf4a8671482ba9c4b98f8909837fcc1127
As suggested in Andreas' comment, I will set the default size to inherit the size in the above case.

I recall that stripe size of second component should be aligned with DOM size at least. So first I thought that probably next component stripe depends on that somehow, so I set its stripe size manually to greater value and lesser one:

# lfs setstripe -E 128k -L mdt -E 2M -S 1M -c 1 -E 4M -c 2 -E -1 -c 4 /mnt/lustre/test2
# lfs setstripe -E 128k -L mdt -E 2M -S 64k -c 1 -E 4M -c 2 -E -1 -c 4 /mnt/lustre/test3

both commands were successful and all components starting with second have stripe size as 1M and 64k respectively. So it looks like 'lfs' issue which uses last set stripe size value as default one

It is not connected with DoM also, it inherits just any last declared stripe size:

lfs setstripe -E 128k -c 1 -S 64k -E 2M -c 1 -E 4M -c 2 -E -1 -c 4 /mnt/lustre/test4

all stripe sizes are 64k in all components

Actually, I think the stripe size for the DoM component is always the same size as the component size itself, so it probably makes sense to just ignore the stripe size from this component completely, and instead inherit the default stripe size from the parent directory or root directory or the filesystem default.

Jian Yu, Zhenyu Xu, Mikhail Pershin, I would appreciate your thoughts on this.

Andreas, I really like your suggestion of inheriting the size only if it’s larger than or at least equal to the default, otherwise, defaulting to the default size. Once we agree on the desired behavior, I will proceed with implementing it for testing and push the changes

rajeevm, thanks for raising this question. I suspect that this is "unintended consequences" for the combined action a number of patches that landed over time. Can you please fill in the fields for the affected version, and check if this behaviour has changed between releases.

Setting the DoM stripe_size = component size makes sense by itself, and normally layout parameters are inherited from one component to the next (i.e. stripe_size, stripe_count, pool), so this also makes sense in isolation. I do not think it makes sense to inherit a small (or possibly any?) stripe size from the DoM component to the rest of the components. The same situation might happen with e.g. a very small flash OST component (e.g. "-E 256K --pool flash -E 1G --pool hdd" as we have seen at some sites with very small hybrid flash pools).

It might make sense to avoid the stripe_size inheritance to the next component when stripe_size == component_size? I was wondering if that should only apply to the case where stripe_size < default_stripe_size or not, but if the DoM component is large (e.g. 16M), then we may not want to inherit a 16MB stripe_size to the rest of the file?

yujian, bobijam, tappro, any thoughts on what should be done here?

Rajeev

You should be able to assign the ticket to yourself. Have you tried to do this but it did not work?

Peter
You can assign the bug to me. Please provide details on whether it requires a documentation update or a code change to ensure that the default stripe size for DOM components is set to 1 MB.
